feedback.text: Dear Sir and Madam. I would like to implore you to include digital games (that is , all the computer games that are being made nowadays) in the Digital Fairness Act. These products have been abused for far too long by reckless publishers (the culprits here are not small publishers but huge corporations overflowing with profit!) that cancel consumer's access to the product they bought on a whim, with shortest notice and as they state within their EULA , "at any time and with no reason" at all. Yours, sincerely .
